---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for PlaudBlenderiOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem or user constraint? Please describe.
*(e.g., "I find it hard to review timeline recording items when traveling without network access...")*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you would like to see implemented.
*(e.g., "Implement a local SwiftData model cache that updates whenever connection bootstraps succeed...")*

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Technical Details (If Applicable)

Outline any specific SwiftUI layouts, ViewModel variables, or API routes affected:
- **Views**: [e.g., TimelineView]
- **ViewModels**: [e.g., TimelineViewModel]
- **API endpoints**: [e.g., GET /api/v1/days]
- **Storage/Security**: [e.g., Keychain, SwiftData schema updates]
